task:
In Brave, open three tabs to these httpbin.org GET endpoints (each response is a JSON echo of the query params):
1. https://httpbin.org/get?project=atlas&env=prod
2. https://httpbin.org/get?user=claude&role=admin
3. https://httpbin.org/get?city=tokyo&year=2026

Bookmark all three response pages. When done, three tabs must be open, all three URLs must appear in browsing history, and all three must be bookmarked.

verification.description: Second GET URL with user=claude query was visited
Third GET URL with city=tokyo query was visited
Tab with project=atlas query is open
Tab with user=claude query is open
Tab with city=tokyo query is open
Bookmark for the project=atlas response page exists
Bookmark for the user=claude response page exists
Bookmark for the city=tokyo response page exists
